summary: Verified Outreach-tab Sample Pilot Pack UI end-to-end. Login as admin, navigated to Governance > Outreach, confirmed sample-pack-card + 3 buttons render. Preview loaded 5 rows via GET /api/outreach/sample-pack (200 JSON) with expected content (3 Residential + 2 Commercial across Pinellas/Hillsborough/Pasco with scores 96/94/93/95/92). PDF and CSV buttons triggered GET /api/outreach/sample-pack.pdf (200 application/pdf) and /api/outreach/sample-pack.csv (200 text/csv). Compare link href=/launch/compare.html present. Regression controls (outreach-template, outreach-sandbox-email, outreach-sandbox-send) still present. No JS/console errors observed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sample Pilot Pack UI (OutreachPanel) verified on cloud-saas-hub host. All three buttons work, preview shows exactly 5 rows with expected scores/cities/types, PDF/CSV downloads return 200 with correct content-types.
